mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, writer, name, password, email, regidate FROM gueuser WHERE password = #{password} and writer = #{writer}
SELECT user_id as userId, writer, name, password, email, regidate FROM gueuser WHERE writer = #{writer}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gueuser( writer, name, password, email ) VALUES( #{writer}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}
)
